questions.question: The word “ fine ” can mean good or a penalty one must pay. This is an example of \_\_\_\_\_. Matriculation Level 29/07/2025 (Shift - 1)
options: antonym
homonym
metaphor
synonym
questions.solution: Homonym ऐसे शब्द जिनकी spelling और pronunciation समान होते हैं लेकिन अर्थ अलग होते हैं। शब्द 'fine' के दो अलग अर्थ हैं लेकिन spelling और pronunciation समान है। इसलिए , 'fine' homonym का एक उदाहरण है।

questions.question: Identify the sentence that uses the superlative degree of comparison. Matriculation Level 31/07/2025 (Shift - 1)
options: He is as talented as his brother.
He is more talented than his friend.
He is the most talented artist in the competition.
He is talented in painting.
questions.solution: He is the most talented artist in the competition. Superlative degree, 'most talented' का use option (a) में किया गया है। अतः , option (a) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: Choose the sentence that correctly uses the comparative degree. Matriculation Level 31/07/2025 (Shift - 1)
options: Her idea is the more creative of all.
Her idea is the most creative in the class.
Her idea is as creative as mine.
Her idea is more creative than mine.
questions.solution: Her idea is more creative than mine. Option (d) में दिए गए sentence में सही comparative degree, 'more creative' का use किया गया है। अतः , option (d) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: Which among the following sentences is wrong? Higher Secondary 02/08/2025 (Shift - 2)
options: The captain turned down the sails to increase the speed.
The captain looked after the injured sailor.
The captain put up the flag on the mast.
The captain called off the meeting due to bad weather.
questions.solution: The captain turned down the sails to increase the speed. Phrasal verb "turn down" का अर्थ है reject करना या reduce करना , इसलिए इसे speed बढ़ाने के लिए use नहीं किया जा सकता है। Sails को lower करने से actually speed कम हो जाती है , जिससे sentence गलत हो जाता है। बाकी sentences में अपने phrasal verbs का सही use किया गया है।

questions.question: Select the sentence containing the homonym of the highlighted word: The fisherman struggled against the strong current of the river. Higher Secondary 29/08/2025 (Shift - 2)
options: The current near the waterfall pulls objects rapidly toward the edge.
The reporter covered the current events happening in the city.
The swimmers avoided the dangerous ocean current.
The rescue team measured the water current before entering.
questions.solution: The reporter covered the current events happening in the city. Highlighted sentence में , 'current' का अर्थ है जल प्रवाह। Option (b) में , 'current' का अर्थ है present या recent, जिसका meaning अलग है लेकिन spelling और pronunciation समान है , जो इसे homonym बनाता है।

questions.question: Select the correct adverb form to fill in the blank. The athlete completed the final lap \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_ despite extreme fatigue. Graduate Level 25/07/2025 (Shift - 3)
options: stronger
strongly
strongerly
more strongly
questions.solution: strongly क्योंकि दिए गए sentence में कोई comparison नहीं है , इसलिए positive degree का प्रयोग होगा। ‘Strongly’ एक positive degree adverb है। अतः , ‘strongly’ सबसे उपयुक्त answer है।

questions.question: Determine the part of speech of the highlighted word in the given sentence. This is the most simple and basic component of life. Graduate Level 26/07/2025 (Shift - 3)
options: Noun
Pronoun
Adjective
Adverb Solutions :-
questions.solution: Pronoun दिए गए sentence में ‘This’ एक demonstrative pronoun है। मुख्य रूप से चार Demonstrative pronouns हैं - this, that, these, those. SSC Stenographer 2025 Tier - I

questions.question: Which among the following sentences uses adjective with correct degree of comparison.
options: New Delhi is more hotter to Chandigarh.
New Delhi is more hotter than Chandigarh.
New Delhi is hotter to Chandigarh.
New Delhi is hotter than Chandigarh.
questions.solution: New Delhi is hotter than Chandigarh. Adjective ‘hot’ की comparative degree ‘hotter’ होता है , ‘more hotter’ नहीं। सही structure “comparative adjective + than” है। अतः , option (d) सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: Choose the sentence with correct collocation for the word 'pattern'
options: The chef has arranged the cherries by a pattern.
The chef has arranged the cherries of a pattern.
The chef has arranged the cherries with a pattern.
The chef has arranged the cherries in a pattern.
questions.solution: The chef has arranged the cherries in a pattern. 'In a pattern' सही collocation है , जिसका अर्थ है एक विशेष डिजाइन (particular design) या क्रम (order) के अनुसार। अतः , option (d) सही collocation का प्रयोग करता है।

questions.question: Identify the sentence that correctly uses the word ‘memento’.
options: She mementoed the event by writing a long diary entry.
He kept the ticket as a memento of his first train journey.
The teacher memento the student for good behaviour.
A memento is something that will forget memories with time.
questions.solution: He kept the ticket as a memento of his first train journey. ‘Memento’ का अर्थ होता है ऐसा object जो search on TG -@freepdfhall किसी व्यक्ति , स्थान या घटना की याद के रूप में रखा जाता है। Option (b) में ‘memento’ का प्रयोग noun के रूप में उसके proper sense में किया गया है , जहाँ यह किसी past experience को याद रखने के लिए सुरक्षित रखी गई चीज़ को दर्शाता है।

questions.question: Fill in the blank with the correct homophone: \_\_\_\_\_\_\_coming from the kitchen.
options: They
There
Their
They’re
questions.solution: They’re ‘They’re’ “They are” का contraction है। ‘Are + V ing ’ present continuous tense का सही grammatical structure है। अतः , They’re सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है।

questions.question: I waited for so more years to be with you.
options: I waited for so more
years to be
with you
No error Solutions :-
questions.solution: I waited for so more years to be with you. ‘Many’ का प्रयोग plural countable nouns के साथ किया जाता है। ‘Years’ एक plural noun है। अतः , ‘I waited for so many’ सबसे उपयुक्त उत्तर है। search on TG -@freepdfhall
